hook.text: HALL WANTS UNITED AFTER ENGLAND SNUB

beats.text: LEWIS HALL LEFT OUT OF ENGLAND'S WORLD CUP SQUAD
HALL IS KEEN ON A MOVE TO OLD TRAFFORD
INEOS ACCELERATING — A BID EXPECTED SOON

caption: INEOS are accelerating their move for Lewis Hall — the Newcastle left-back is reportedly frustrated at missing England's World Cup squad and keen on joining United for Champions League football. Newcastle want £60m. Who else should we target at left-back? 🔴 Per Football365 / The Sun.
